page_metadata.bioconda__summary: GeneSplicer : A computational method for splice site prediction
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Genesplicer : a computational method for splice site prediction
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A fast, flexible system for detecting splice sites in the genomic DNA of various eukaryotes. The system has been trained and tested successfully on Plasmodium falciparum (malaria), Arabidopsis thaliana, human, Drosophila, and rice.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A fast, flexible system for detecting splice sites in the genomic DNA of various eukaryotes. The system has been trained and tested successfully on Plasmodium falciparum (malaria), Arabidopsis thaliana, human, Drosophila, and rice.
